modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Camera display issues during Zoom meetings

full_description_text:  
The user reported problems with their camera when joining a Zoom meeting. They mentioned that the image jumps up and down on the screen, and there are lines through the camera display. Additionally, the user sees a crossed out camera icon even though the camera is enabled in Zoom. The quality of the camera is also not very good during the meeting, causing frustration.
short_description: Camera display issues during Zoom meetings
description: The user reported problems with their camera when joining a Zoom meeting. They mentioned that the image jumps up and down on the screen, and there are lines through the camera display. Additionally, the user sees a crossed out camera icon even though the camera is enabled in Zoom. The quality of the camera is also not very good during the meeting, causing frustration.
